patches.hypothesis: The Week constructor is using the default locale and time zone instead of the provided ones, causing incorrect week calculations in different locales.
patches.changes:
- this(time, RegularTimePeriod.DEFAULT_TIME_ZONE, Locale.getDefault());
+ this(time, zone, Locale.getDefault());
patches.diff:
- this(time, RegularTimePeriod.DEFAULT_TIME_ZONE, Locale.getDefault());
+ this(time, zone, Locale.getDefault());

patches.hypothesis: The original constructor ignores the time zone and locale, always using default values. This causes incorrect week calculation when the locale and time zone differ from the defaults.
patches.changes: + Pass the correct TimeZone instead of DEFAULT_TIME_ZONE in the constructor
patches.diff: + Pass the correct TimeZone instead of DEFAULT_TIME_ZONE in the constructor
